title: JourneyNotQuests
description: A plugin that connects NotQuests to Journey
body:
# NotQuests + Journey

JourneyNotQuests connects Journey to NotQuests by Alessio. Users of NotQuests can now leverage Journey's powerful path-finding engine by searching for paths to quest objectives. 

Players may use Journey's commands or the Journey GUI to start a search to any active objective, or alternatively, server administrators can edit their quest config files to automatically search for paths to players' next objectives when they obtain a new one.

**Use JourneyNotQuests and Journey to make your RPG server more fun and immersive!**

[Read the wiki](https://journey.whimxiqal.net/docs/admin/integration) to learn about how it works.
